# Archive README Template

## Purpose

Use this template for archive folder README files. Archive folders store obsolete or superseded materials for historical reference only.

## Template Body

```md
# Archive

## Warning

This folder contains historical material only. It is not the current source of truth.

## What Is Archived Here

Describe what may be archived in this folder.

## Why Materials Are Archived

Describe why archived material remains useful.

## Current Sources Of Truth

- [<Current document>](<relative-link>)

## Rules For Adding Archived Materials

- Add only obsolete or superseded materials.
- Include a reason and date when possible.
- Link to the current source of truth.
- Do not use archive content as active project memory.
```
